# Security Policy

See the [root SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the full vulnerability reporting policy, severity definitions, and disclosure timeline.

**Quick summary:**

- **Do not file public GitHub issues** for security vulnerabilities
- Use [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/Manzela/Atelier/security/advisories/new) — encrypted, routes directly to the maintainers
- We aim for 48-hour acknowledgment, 30-day fix for High/Critical
- Coordinated disclosure with 90-day embargo for High/Critical
